parameters.subject: =Automation - Med Order - Miss matched Script
parameters.message:
=Hi Team,

Automation has identified a mismatch between Med Orders and the scripts uploaded for orders generated on {{ $('Call ZenotiNZ-MasterTriggerChildClinicCompoundLabOrder-CheckFolder').item.json.dateFolderName }}.

At this stage, I can see {{ $('Call ZenotiNZ-MasterTriggerChildClinicCompoundLabOrder-CheckFolder').item.json.orderCount }} orders and {{ $('Call ZenotiNZ-MasterTriggerChildClinicCompoundLabOrder-CheckFolder').item.json.fileCount }} scripts.

Please review the folder and upload the missing scripts so the number of scripts matches the number of orders.

Regards,
Automation

nodes.name: Send message and wait for response

parameters.subject: =Automation - Med Order - {{ $json.name }}
parameters.message:
=Hi Team,

Automation is ready to sends meds for {{ $json.name }} to Compound Lab.

Please go over Med Order and click Continue when ready!

Regards,
Automation

parameters.subject: =AM NZ - Automate Med Order - {{ $json.startDate }}
parameters.bodyContent:
=Hi Team,

Please see attached files to order for the clinic {{ $('Get Clinic').item.json.name }} for date {{ $('Bring Forward Clinic Payload').item.json.startDate }}. Any issues please contact {{ $('Get Clinic').item.json.email }}.

Regards,
Automation
